theme: Dynamic (Light Sunny Default, Dark Storm Alert Mode)

layout_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] flex flex-col bg-background relative overflow-hidden text-foreground

surface_strategies.widgets: Sunny Mode: Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/40 shadow-sm). Storm Mode: Solid Tactile (bg-[#1A1A1D] border border-red-500/20 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,59,48,0.1)]).
surface_strategies.panic_button: Red background, heavy drop shadow, surrounded by pinging concentric rings (animate-ping) for high urgency.
surface_strategies.bottom_nav: Fixed bottom, backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/80 (Sunny) or bg-black/80 (Storm), border-t border-border.

components.dashboard_grid: Mode B: 'Control Room' grid layout adapted for mobile bento. Primary widgets (Transport/Alerts) span full width, secondary (Weather/Status) span half width.
components.wave_effect: Implement subtle Y-axis staggered animations on scroll/load. Use Framer Motion variants to mimic a wave rolling in.
components.light_heatmap: Dark background container with overlapping absolute positioned glowing yellow radial gradients to simulate power grid.
components.chatbot: Floating action button with 'Uncle Zhora' avatar icon. Chat modal opens with slide-up motion.
components.qr_ticket: Center-aligned card with high-contrast QR code, bold typography for transport routes, and a scanning border effect.

motion.page_transition: Framer Motion slide in from bottom with spring physics
motion.water_splash: Use Framer Motion to create a ripple effect on tap (scale up an absolute circle with opacity fade).

image_urls.description: Monumental statue. Use as subtle background in the profile or services header.
Calm sea water. Overlay with white/blue gradient for Sunny mode dashboard background.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against wave/storm backgrounds meets WCAG AA 4.5:1. Storm mode neon red must be legible against deep grey.
accessibility.test_ids: Add data-testid to all widgets, nav items, and the panic button (e.g., data-testid='panic-button').
accessibility.motion_preference: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the wave scroll inertia and pinging alerts.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a mobile-first hybrid app. Set up the main layout as a centered max-w-md column (mocking a mobile screen) on desktop, or full width on mobile viewports.
Implement a global Theme Context that toggles between 'sunny' and 'storm' modes based on a simulated 'air raid alert' state toggle in the UI.
Sunny mode: use a blue-to-white subtle gradient background with glassmorphic bento cards.
Storm mode: force the theme to dark, change primary accents to #FF3B30 (Neon Red), and apply a subtle red border glow to critical widgets.
For the SentryNode Panic Button, use a full-width block or large circular button with a pulsating background layer to draw immediate attention.
Mock the 'Where's Light' map using an interactive container with scattered glowing dots on a dark abstract map SVG.
Use lucide-react for all iconography (waves, trams, shields, lightbulbs, navigation tabs).
